title: PolyWave Synthesizer
description: 4-voice polyphonic synth — shape sound with ADSR, filter, reverb, delay, an 8×16 step sequencer, and true WAV export.
concept: A full-featured soft synth in a single HTML file. Choose from 4 waveforms, detune two oscillators per voice for width, sculpt with attack/decay/sustain/release, route through a resonant filter, convolution reverb, and feedback delay. The 8-row pentatonic sequencer lets you compose loops while you play on the 2-octave keyboard. QWERTY keyboard mapping included. Hit Record and download a true 16-bit PCM WAV of your performance.
features: 4 waveforms (sine, sawtooth, square, triangle) with dual detuned oscillators per voice
ADSR envelope + resonant low-pass filter + convolution reverb + feedback delay
8×16 step sequencer with BPM control, randomise, and clear
5 one-click presets (Lead, Pad, Bass, Pluck, Keys)
True 16-bit WAV recording and download via ScriptProcessorNode PCM capture
QWERTY keyboard mapping + multi-touch piano keys

interaction.mouse: Click piano keys to play; drag sequencer cells to toggle
interaction.click: Wave buttons, presets, sequencer play/stop; Record to capture audio
interaction.keyboard: A–J = C3–B3; Z–M = C4–B4; W E T Y U = sharps
